top_signals.title: The AI economy is rewriting the American Dream — and blue-collar workers are poised to win
top_signals.summary: AI-driven hiring slowdowns are hitting some entry-level jobs for college graduates as companies like Ford and AT&T ramp up recruiting for skilled trade workers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: EQT CEO Says New Tech Fund Will Help Europe’s Scale-Up Problem
top_signals.summary: A new fund targeting Europe’s most promising startups will help the region create more global champions, according to the head of private equity group EQT AB.
